summary: Comprehensive backend testing of Visor AI Agent - India-first multilingual financial AI companion. All 28 tests passed (100% success rate). Core features verified: Hinglish chat, SIP/EMI/FIRE/PPF calculator auto-detection, live stock prices, finance-only guardrail, web search for news, Tamil/Marathi/Hindi transliteration understanding, chat history CRUD.
critical_code_review_comments: All Visor AI Agent features working correctly - no issues found
Calculator auto-detection working precisely - SIP query with '10000 per month at 12% for 15 years' returned correct Future Value ₹50,45,760
EMI calculator for '50 lakh at 8.5% for 20 years' correctly calculated EMI ₹43,391
Finance-only guardrail working perfectly - joke/poem requests are redirected with 'Main Visor hoon — tera finance buddy' response
Tamil transliteration 'Enna mutual fund invest pannanum?' correctly understood and responded with personalized investment advice based on user's risk profile
Web search triggers correctly for news/RBI/budget queries
Chat history GET/DELETE endpoints working correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo account data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visor AI Agent backend fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/visor-ai/chat (LLM-powered chat with calculator auto-detection, stock prices, web search), GET /api/visor-ai/history, DELETE /api/visor-ai/history. Each chat API call takes 5-15 seconds due to LLM processing. Calculator auto-detection extracts numbers from user messages and returns structured 'calculator_result' in response. Finance-only guardrail politely redirects non-finance queries. Tamil/Marathi/Hindi transliteration understood correctly. Frontend component at /app/frontend/src/components/AIAdvisorChat.tsx not tested per request.

features_verified.POST /api/visor-ai/chat - basic Hinglish: PASS - Response in Hinglish, correct structure with id, user_msg_id, role, content, created_at
features_verified.POST /api/visor-ai/chat - SIP calculator: PASS - Auto-detected 'SIP Calculator', returned monthly_sip: ₹10,000, future_value: ₹5,045,760, wealth_gained
features_verified.POST /api/visor-ai/chat - EMI calculator: PASS - Auto-detected 'EMI Calculator', returned loan_amount: ₹5,000,000, monthly_emi: ₹43,391, total_interest
features_verified.POST /api/visor-ai/chat - live stock pri: PASS - Reliance, TCS, Infosys, Nifty 50 queries successful
features_verified.POST /api/visor-ai/chat - finance guardr: PASS - Jokes/poems rejected with 'Main Visor hoon — tera finance buddy...' redirect
features_verified.POST /api/visor-ai/chat - web search: PASS - News/RBI/budget queries trigger search and return results
features_verified.POST /api/visor-ai/chat - Tamil translit: PASS - 'Enna mutual fund invest pannanum?' understood and answered with personalized advice
features_verified.GET /api/visor-ai/history: PASS - Returns list of messages with id, role, content, created_at
features_verified.DELETE /api/visor-ai/history: PASS - Clears all chat history, verified empty after clear
